description: This file is a utility module for measuring web performance metrics using the 'web-vitals' library. It exports a default function, 'reportWebVitals', that, when invoked with a callback, asynchronously loads the 'web-vitals' module and calls specific metric functions to report performance data.

methods.name: reportWebVitals(onPerfEntry)
methods.description: A function that, if provided with a callback function 'onPerfEntry', loads the 'web-vitals' module asynchronously and invokes metric functions to measure web performance metrics, passing the callback to each metric function.
